item.title: Ex-Husband Couldn’t Accept Her New Love
item.description: We hear heartbreaking and thrilling and cases solely fueled by jealousy. This is one of those absolutely chilling ones... What are your thoughts on this case?

media:content.media:title: Ex-Husband Couldn’t Accept Her New Love
media:content.media:description: We hear heartbreaking and thrilling and cases solely fueled by jealousy. This is one of those absolutely chilling ones... What are your thoughts on this case?

item.title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
item.description:
In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.”
What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

media:content.media:title: Pastor's Secret Affair Turned FATAL
media:content.media:description:
In the court hearing “To Tabatha, I’m so sorry. I never meant to hurt you, and I pray that all of you guys will forgive me,” Daniels said. “I’m godly sorry, and I know it doesn’t take back what has happened, nor does it negate what has happened, but I want you to know that I am so sorry for the pain that I’ve caused you.”
What are your thoughts about this case? - Em x

item.title: Footage Showed the Chilling Last Moments of Sonya Massey
item.description: The Sonya Massey is a controversial topic where some people claim that she posed no immediate threat to the officers while the others say officers did what they had to do to defend themselves. What are your thoughts?

media:content.media:description: The Sonya Massey is a controversial topic where some people claim that she posed no immediate threat to the officers while the others say officers did what they had to do to defend themselves. What are your thoughts?

item.title: She Drowned Her Daughters. Now She Keeps Leaving Prison
item.description: What are your thoughts on this tragic situation? What other similar cases have you heard of that haunt you to this day?

media:content.media:title: She Drowned Her Daughters. Now She Keeps Leaving Prison
media:content.media:description: What are your thoughts on this tragic situation? What other similar cases have you heard of that haunt you to this day?

item.title: Zachary Holly Was The Last Person Who Should've Been Babysitting.
item.description: Six-year-old Jersey Bridgeman disappeared from her home in Bentonville, Arkansas, in 2014, setting off an urgent search that ended in tragedy. As investigators followed the evidence, attention turned to someone the family knew well—a trusted neighbor who had helped care for Jersey in the past. This video examines the investigation, the forensic evidence presented in court, and the legal proceedings that followed Zachary Holly's conviction. What warning signs, if any, could have been recognized before it was too late?

media:content.media:title: Zachary Holly Was The Last Person Who Should've Been Babysitting.
media:content.media:description: Six-year-old Jersey Bridgeman disappeared from her home in Bentonville, Arkansas, in 2014, setting off an urgent search that ended in tragedy. As investigators followed the evidence, attention turned to someone the family knew well—a trusted neighbor who had helped care for Jersey in the past. This video examines the investigation, the forensic evidence presented in court, and the legal proceedings that followed Zachary Holly's conviction. What warning signs, if any, could have been recognized before it was too late?
